name: Dilip Chenoy
profileSummary: Dilip Harel Mitra Chenoy is an Indian businessman. In April 2018, he was appointed Secretary General of FICCI, a leading industry body in India. He was earlier the Managing Director & CEO of National Skill Development Corporation (NSDC), a public-private partnership formed under Section 25 of the Companies Act 1956, from 7 May 2010 to 8 October 2015.
